audit_items.proof_trace: The RPC handler serves data columns directly from storage without verifying their parent block passed state transition. Data columns are saved asynchronously (subscriber_beacon_blocks.go:40) before block validation completes (L42). The storage retrieval at L123 has no state transition check.
audit_items.attack_scenario: Attacker proposes a block with invalid state transition. The execution-side data column reconstruction (processDataColumnSidecarsFromExecution) runs async and saves columns to storage before ReceiveBlock validation fails. Peers requesting via DataColumnSidecarsByRoot RPC receive invalid sidecars during the race window.
